sources.title: FDA evaluation of BPC-157-related bulk drug substances for the July 23-24, 2026 PCAC meeting
sources.controlled_finding: FDA identified quality, impurity, aggregation and immunogenicity concerns and proposed that BPC-157 free base and acetate not be included on the 503A Bulks List; this is a proposal pending the relevant regulatory process.

sources.title: Bulk Drug Substances Used in Compounding
sources.controlled_finding: Compounding from bulk drug substances is subject to statutory limits and presents patient risks requiring supplier and substance controls.

sources.title: 2026 World Anti-Doping Code Prohibited List
sources.controlled_finding: BPC-157 is listed under S0 non-approved substances and is prohibited at all times for athletes subject to the WADA Code.

sources.title: BPC 157 for Acute Hamstring Muscle Strain Repair
sources.controlled_finding: A Phase 2 randomized trial is recruiting; no results are posted and the record states that human clinical evidence remains limited.

sources.title: Regeneration or Risk? A Narrative Review of BPC-157 for Musculoskeletal Healing
sources.controlled_finding: The review describes extensive preclinical literature but very limited human evidence and treats BPC-157 as investigational.
